summary_one_line: Input must be a valid sfnt font carrying a 'morx' AAT table tag but no GPOS table, so apply_morx && !apply_gpos holds.

hypotheses.what_input_feature: A font blob whose sfnt header (magic OTTO/0x00010000) and table directory contain the 4-byte AAT tag 'morx' (6d 6f 72 78) while NOT carrying a usable 'GPOS' table, so the shape plan sets apply_morx=true and apply_gpos=false, taking the true branch at line 940.
hypotheses.why_winner_satisfies: Winner seed 1 begins with the sfnt magic 'OTTO' at 0x00 and embeds the literal 'morx' at 0x0c-0x0f; winner seed 2 embeds 'GPOS'/'mort' table tags. The I2S-substituted exact 4-byte tag literals let the harfbuzz table-lookup CMPs match, populating apply_morx and reaching the blocked true side (W shows T=42 at line 940).
hypotheses.why_loser_doesnt: Loser-blocking seeds carry no sfnt magic and no 'morx' tag at the tag offsets (e.g. seed 1 starts fe ff ff ff..., seed 2 e0 17 00 00...); the plan never sets apply_morx, so the branch stays false (L shows T=0 F=190 at line 940) for all 10 trials.
hypotheses.mechanism_attribution: value_profile_cmplog adds the I2SRandReplace mutator, which copies the exact comparison operand (the 4-byte 'morx' tag the sfnt table-tag CMP demands) directly into the input at the right offset. value_profile only has CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance feedback and naive havoc, which cannot synthesize the exact 4-byte tag, so it never sets apply_morx.

evidence_trail.claim: The blocked branch tests apply_morx true and apply_gpos false; true side is globally blocked.
The blocked side is the true branch.
Winner seed 1 contains the sfnt magic OTTO and the literal morx tag.
Winner seed 2 embeds GPOS and mort font table tags.
Loser-blocking seeds carry no sfnt magic at offset 0.
At the blocker, the winner takes the true side 42 times while the loser never does (T=0 F=190).
evidence_trail.exact_quote: d=1   L 940  T=42 F=0  T=0 F=190  if (c->plan->apply_morx && !c->plan->apply_gpos)  <-- BLOCKER

evidence_trail.claim: value_profile lacks I2SRandReplace and relies only on CMP_MAP distance feedback plus havoc/token.
value_profile_cmplog resolved the branch in 8/10 trials while value_profile resolved 0/10.

mechanism_consistency_check.verification_method: ran `python3 tools/db_query.py lineage --branch 5730 --role W --fuzzer value_profile_cmplog --trial 1 --seed ae73a8c9233c3cb8` and observed exactly 1 I2S-floor dash row (mutation_op = -) at depth 18 of the 19-level ancestor chain, the floor signal for an unwrapped I2SRandReplace find under the current build.

falsifiability.would_be_refuted_by: A synthetic harness gating on apply_morx==true && apply_gpos==false where value_profile reaches the true branch as often as value_profile_cmplog, showing CMP_MAP distance feedback alone solves the 4-byte tag without I2S substitution.

weakest_evidence_point: The mapping from the 'morx'/'GPOS' tag literals in the winner bytes to the apply_morx/apply_gpos plan flags is inferred from source semantics, not directly traced through the table-parsing CMPs.
